name: OT Form Report
query:
SELECT 
    ot.date AS "Date:Data:90",
    ot.patient AS "Patient:Data:80",
    ot.patient_name AS "Patient Name:Data:150",
    p.mobile_no AS "Mobile No:Data:120",
    p.p_age AS "Age:Data:60",
    p.age_type AS "Age Type:Data:80",
    ot.doctor AS "Doctor Name:Data:250",
    ot.procedure_name AS "Procedure Name:Data:200",
    ot.other_description AS "Other Description:Data:420",
    ot.amount AS "Amount:Currency:80"
FROM 
    `tabOT Form` ot
LEFT JOIN 
    `tabPatient` p ON ot.patient = p.name
WHERE 
    ot.date BETWEEN %(Start_date)s AND %(End_date)s;
